_doc: Manual override file for the daily Huntress pull. Resolution order: (1) explicit `manual` entry mapping <huntress_org_id> -> <LocationCode>; (2) exact normalized-name match against the active CP client list; (3) <CODE> - <Name> prefix match against active CP LocationCodes (Technijian Huntress org names follow this convention). Anything still unmatched lands in unmapped.json. Add an `ignore` entry for Huntress orgs that should never produce a per-client folder (internal lab tenants, decommissioned clients, the Technijian house tenant, etc.).

_ignore_notes.408553: Technijian house tenant - internal MSP account
